one_line: Gupta princess and Vakataka regent-queen, ruling in her own name in the Deccan.

appearance.age_look: Late 20s to early 30s, medium height, slender yet poised with a calm, commanding bearing.
appearance.face: Oval face with high cheekbones, light brown complexion, straight nose, sharp arched brows, large expressive anime-style dark brown eyes with a steady, judging gaze; usually a composed, dignified half-smile that hints at authority rather than softness.
appearance.hair: Long, black hair oiled and glossy, parted slightly off-center and drawn back into a high, rounded bun at the back of the crown; two sleek side-locks frame her cheeks; a thin gold maang-tikka–like forehead ornament with a small red gemstone sits along the parting; no veil.
appearance.costume: She wears a 5th-century Deccan royal sari in the Gupta-Vakataka style: an unstitched, finely woven cotton-silk sari in deep maroon with narrow gold borders and a subtle, small repeating geometric motif, draped nivi-style but with the pallu brought over the left shoulder and looping around the forearm; underneath, a fitted short-sleeved choli in muted gold; her waist is cinched with a broad gold kamarbandh belt with small pendant plates; she has a single-strand gold necklace with a central lotus pendant, medium-sized gold hoop earrings, stacked slim gold bangles on both wrists, and a simple gold ring on her right hand; feet in plain brown leather sandals; a small, circular red bindi at the center of her forehead reinforces her Gupta heritage.
appearance.signature: A rectangular copper-plate land grant held in her left hand, bound by a visible copper ring with a seal bearing a stylized Garuda emblem and faint incised script, which she presents or studies with an authoritative gesture.

ref_desc: Prabhāvatīgupta is a light-brown, oval-faced woman in her early thirties with large dark brown eyes, black hair in a high rounded bun with side-locks and a gold forehead ornament, wearing a deep maroon Gupta-Vakataka sari with muted gold choli and gold jewelry, holding a rectangular copper-plate grant bound with a sealed ring, in a palette of deep maroon, muted gold, warm brown, black and soft red.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body model sheet of Prabhāvatīgupta in anime style: a dignified woman in her early thirties with a light brown complexion, oval face, high cheekbones, straight nose, sharp brows and large dark brown eyes, her default expression calm and authoritative with a restrained half-smile. Her long black hair is oiled and glossy, parted slightly off-center and drawn into a high rounded bun at the back of the crown, with two smooth side-locks framing her cheeks, and a thin gold forehead ornament with a small red gemstone running along the parting; a small red bindi sits between her brows. She wears a historically accurate 5th-century Deccan royal outfit: an unstitched deep maroon cotton-silk sari with narrow gold borders and a subtle small geometric motif, draped nivi-style with the pleats in front and the pallu brought over her left shoulder and wrapped once around her forearm; beneath is a fitted short-sleeved muted-gold choli. A broad gold kamarbandh belt with pendant plates sits at her waist, and she wears a single-strand gold necklace with a lotus pendant, medium gold hoop earrings, stacked slim gold bangles on both wrists, and a simple gold ring on her right hand. Her feet are in plain brown leather sandals. In her left hand she always holds a rectangular copper-plate land grant bound with a copper ring and seal bearing a stylized Garuda, which she presents or studies with a confident, governing posture. Use a palette dominated by deep maroon, muted gold, warm brown, black and soft red, and show her from front, side and back to clearly display hair, jewelry, sari drape and the copper-plate grant.
